name: aitokenweight-daily-token-poster
description: MCP-compatible tool definitions for the aitokenweight Daily Token Poster skill.

tools.name: collectUsage
tools.description: Collect exact token usage for the current agent run/session from runtime telemetry, provider API, local log, or manual input, then normalize it. If exact current usage is unavailable, report usage_unavailable instead of using defaults.

tools.name: renderPoster
tools.description: Render DailyTokenUsage plus Agent-authored funLine, verdict, energyLine, and three dynamic energyComparisons with the aitokenweight template.

x-aitokenweight.bootstrapCommand: npm ci && npx playwright install chromium
x-aitokenweight.remoteRenderCommand: git clone https://github.com/susyimes/aitokenweight.git && cd aitokenweight && npm ci && npx playwright install chromium && follow public/.well-known/prompts/current-token-usage.md; render only with exact current usage evidence
x-aitokenweight.runtimeNote: A host agent may implement collectUsage itself, call a remote usage service, or pass a manual DailyTokenUsage object directly to renderPoster.
